title: mklang runtime config
description: Host-side runtime configuration for mklang: selects a provider and maps capability tiers (fast/balanced/reasoning) to concrete models. NOT part of any .mk file. See SPEC.md §2.1.

active.description: Key of the provider block the runtime uses (must exist in `providers`).

tier_map.description: Maps each capability tier to a concrete model id.

api_key_env.description: Name of the env var holding this provider's API key.

judge.description: Optional GLOBAL judge-model override: forces one model for ALL gate judging. When omitted (the default), each state's gates are judged by that state's own capability tier (SPEC §2.1) — set this only as a cost/latency optimization that trades judging quality on high-tier gates.

params.description: Per-tier, provider-specific generation params (effort, thinking, reasoning_effort, …). Free-form; validated by the runtime, not here.
